name: SingleStore MCP Server
what_it_does: Official MCP server from SingleStore Labs (singlestore-labs org) for SingleStoreDB — a cloud-native distributed SQL database with real-time analytics and vector search capabilities. Enables AI agents to query, manage, and interact with SingleStore databases, supporting both SQL analytics workloads and vector similarity search for AI applications.
use_cases: Querying SingleStore databases for real-time analytics from data agents
Running vector similarity searches for AI-powered recommendation agents
Managing SingleStore workspaces and database schema from DevOps agents
Integrating SingleStore's combined OLTP/OLAP capabilities into AI workflows
not_for: Pure document storage use cases (use MongoDB or similar)
best_when: A team using SingleStoreDB wants AI agents to query data, run analytics, or perform vector searches against their SingleStore instance — particularly for real-time AI applications.
avoid_when: You use other databases. SingleStore's real-time analytics and vector search capabilities are distinctive but you need SingleStore specifically — not a generic SQL interface.

auth.notes: SingleStore connection string with username/password or API key. Standard database authentication. Use least-privilege DB users for agent connections.

pricing.free_tier_limits: SingleStore Helios free tier: shared workspace, limited storage and compute
pricing.paid_tiers: Paid tiers for dedicated compute, higher storage, and enterprise features
pricing.notes: Free tier available on SingleStore Helios cloud. MCP server is free open source from singlestore-labs. Production use requires paid tier.

performance.rate_limits: Bounded by SingleStore connection pool and query complexity

known_agent_gotchas: SingleStore's real-time analytics means agents can run very expensive queries — set query timeouts
Vector search capabilities require proper index setup — don't assume vector indexes exist
Free tier has shared compute — expect variable latency in development
singlestore-labs org indicates community/developer tooling — may evolve faster than production APIs
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS to SingleStore Helios cloud. Database credentials must be secured. Use least-privilege DB users. SingleStore supports HIPAA/SOC2/ISO27001 at enterprise tiers.

security_score_components.security_notes: Database credentials required. TLS to SingleStore cloud. Enterprise compliance certifications available. Use read-only users for analytics agents.
